name: Squash Soup for One (or 2 Not So Hungry People)
recipeIngredient: 1 acorn squash, cut in half and seeds removed
1/2 tsp. Liquid Aminos (110 mg sodium) or salt, optional
recipeInstructions:
1 Place the squash halves cut-side down in a baking dish covered with 1/2 inch water.
2 Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until cooled.
3 Scoop out the flesh and puree in a blender with the baked garlic and vegetable stock.
4 Transfer the puree to a small saucepan and add spices and wild rice.
5 Heat on low until the soup is hot.
